verdict: Azelaic acid at 10% targets hyperpigmentation, rosacea, and acne with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial action. The solid 4.2★ rating across 5800 reviews demonstrates this often-overlooked ingredient's real efficacy.

_research.name: Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
_research.con: Azelaic acid has gritty texture and can feel drying; requires robust hydration layering.
